case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. MAURICE WILLIAMSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMSON, MAURICE DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMSON, MAURICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1886 25TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107; SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**
